query: How does the CLOSEFIL JCL close all files?

results.name: CLOSEFIL Header
CLCIFIL
OPENFIL Header
OPCIFIL
9200-XREFFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBSTM03A.CBL
Program: CBSTM03A
Paragraph: 9200-XREFFILE-CLOSE (lines 873-888)
References: COPY COSTM01, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CUSTREC, COPY CVACT01Y
Calls: CALL CBSTM03B, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9200-XREFFILE-CLOSE in CBSTM03A.CBL. uses COPY refs: COSTM01, CVACT03Y, CUSTREC, CVACT01Y. invokes: CALL CBSTM03B, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9200-XREFFILE-CLOSE.
           MOVE 'XREFFILE' TO WS-M03B-DD.
           SET M03B-CLOSE TO TRUE.
           MOVE ZERO TO WS-M03B-RC.
           CALL 'CBSTM03B' USING WS-M03B-AREA.

           IF WS-M03B-RC = '00' OR '04'
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING XREFFILE'
               DISPLAY 'RETURN CODE: ' WS-M03B-RC
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF.

           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 9400-TRANFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBACT04C.cbl
Program: CBACT04C - BATCH COBOL Program - This is a interest calculator program.
Paragraph: 9400-TRANFILE-CLOSE (lines 595-612)
References: COPY CVTRA01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9400-TRANFILE-CLOSE in CBACT04C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA01Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA02Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.
results.content:
9400-TRANFILE-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE TRANSACT-FILE                                                  
           IF  TRANFILE-STATUS  = '00'                                          
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION FILE'                         
               MOVE TRANFILE-STATUS  TO IO-STATUS                               
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.
